---
title: '&quot;I&#39;m really good at profiling, especially what kin...'
date: '2015-12-13T16:48:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '7966136594010079358'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

&quot;I&#39;m really good at profiling, especially what kind of cars they drive. Most mexicans drive Hondas...
